What's up everyone? Everyone's least favorite overcome of all time. Because you got over everything. They're like, yeah sure I totally want to do that. I just forgot my credit card at home. You're like, man how do I get over that? They literally have no way to pay. And for a really long time there wasn't really a way to get over that. They said there's no way to pay. But now there is and it's amazing. So as soon as they say that and they think they have, you're like, oh totally no problem. Just pull your phone app up with your banking app and just pull up on your statements and it'll have your account number there and then you just Google the routing. And that way you can do an ACH debit. So as long as your business can do an ACH debit, that no longer becomes an obstacle anymore. So I used to think they'd have to have their checkbook which no one had on them. But nowadays I did not know this but one of my sales guys Taylor who crushes it came up with that. And you realize that the account number was on their phone, in their bank app. And I didn't think it was true. I pulled my phone out. I was like dude it's not there. And he's like no there's a place where you can just look for your statements. Usually if you have like a chase app it'll be where the actual total is. It'll say see statements and then your statements are right there and the account number is on the top right. But most banks will have that available. So you'd be like no problem. You have your phone with you and they'll be like yeah, like cool. Because they're thinking you're gonna say call or something like just pull up your bank app and we'll be able to get you routing. And like that's fire. He right now he was telling me that he closes two people a day with that. So that's two more sales a day that he gets because he's been able to overcome one really big objection. So that's a huge one and it's awesome and I figured it deserved its own video because that's such a breakthrough and I'm like mind blown. Alright so hope that helps. Hope you're closing more sales and we will talk to you soon.
